theme: Light Default with Dark Mode Support
global_rules: Follow 'Organic & Earthy' color palette. No neon or synthetic colors.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8, p-12) for containers.
Borders must be 1px and subtle. Shadows are soft ambient only.
Mobile-first for crew portal, desktop-optimized for dashboards.
All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attributes.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-50
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-50
hierarchy.small_label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-semibold

components.buttons: Shadcn custom. Minimal radius (max 8px). Primary actions use brand green with high-contrast text. Crew buttons must be min-h-[64px] for field gloved hands.
components.cards: Dashboard widgets should use flat backgrounds with 1px subtle borders (border-border). Hover triggers slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.forms: Inputs use Shadcn. Crew Incident/Damage toggle must be a high-friction visual checkbox/switch to avoid misclicks. Form labels left-aligned.
components.rapid_review_interface: Full-screen mode. Main image occupies 70% of view. Side panel (30%) for scoring rubric. Absolute positioning for swipe indicators or keyboard shortcuts (Left/Right arrows for fail/pass, Up for auto-pass).
components.login_background: Implement out-of-focus vector grass via SVG and CSS. Use `<svg>` paths of grass blades anchored to the bottom, animated with CSS `transform: rotate()` keyframes, layered with `blur-md` and `opacity-50`.

layout_strategies.crew_portal: Single-column mobile grid. Emphasize camera/photo submission actions.
layout_strategies.management_dashboard: The 'Control Room' grid. Dense and scannable. `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4`. Use `h-full` to stretch widgets.
layout_strategies.owner_dashboard: Emphasis on data-viz (Heatmap). Wide bento box layout for repeat offender tables and dataset export controls.
layout_strategies.navigation: Unified login -> Role-based routing. Header should use Glassmorphism strategy. Standard Library opens as a sliding sheet or dedicated tab for crew.

motion.rapid_review: Cards should slide out smoothly left/right upon scoring. Zero loading delay between images (preload next image array).
motion.login_grass: Slow, organic sway. `animation: sway 4s ease-in-out infinite alternate;` applied to SVG elements.
motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change color/brightness on hover. Buttons `hover:-translate-y-0.5`.

crew_work_1.description: Crew member pulling wheelbarrow. Use as sample photo in rapid review or dashboards.

mowing_work.description: Lawn mowing landscape. Good for standard library examples.

tree_pruning.description: Tree branches against blue sky. Good for Sarver Tree division placeholder.

iconography.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2 based on density. Phosphor icons alternative if more diverse set needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: PHASE 1: Build the unified login screen with wobbling SVG grass, role credentials logic, and dark/light theme toggle. Theme toggle must persist without breaking login UI.
PHASE 2: Implement Role-Based Navigation Restrictions and routing structure (Crew, Management, Owner).
PHASE 3: Build Rapid Review Mode. It MUST be full-screen, minimal UI, with keyboard shortcuts (arrow keys) and swipe-capable cards. Preload images for instant transitions.
PHASE 4: Implement the Crew Portal with 'No-login' view, dynamic QR hook, and the Incident/Damage reporting toggle (high-friction).
PHASE 5: Build out the Owner/Management dashboards (Calibration heatmap, repeat offender tracking, dataviz).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural overlays, Shadcn for intricate logic forms (like date pickers, dropdowns).
